title: [PR] Infer the provider from the key present; stop creating AUTOFILL_PROVIDER

Onboarding wrote `AUTOFILL_PROVIDER` on **every** path, and `_detect_provider()` honors it above all keys. Written once, it outranked every later choice — and once the value escaped into a shell export, nothing the tool offered could override it (`.env` loads with `override=False`, so th

title: 申请加入请在这里评论 （也可以直接发 Pull Request）
summary:
### 入选标准
* 网站 / App
* 如果是 Github 库， README 或顶部描述里，要附上网站或 App Store 地址，不能是纯粹针对开发者的工具，如果包含了针对开发者的工具，那就太多了。所以只允许针对普通用户的网站/App 列在表里

### 不收录的东西
* 开发者工具（Github 本质上就是个开发者工具大集合，收录开发者工具这个表会爆炸的）
* 社区类网站（v2ex，ruby-china，各种 php 社区，太多太多太多了。没法收。希望理解）

### 流程
看了评论后会做决定，
如果入了，会加进去。
如果没入，会告知你理由（希望你不要介意 :

title: [PR] fix(helm): Stop Prometheus and Grafana surging under the project quota
summary:
Closes #141.

`maxSurge: 0` from #139 only rendered for `.Values.services`, so the quota deadlock was half fixed. Postgres and NATS already used `Recreate`, but the Prometheus and Grafana Deployments declared no `strategy` and inherited the default `maxSurge: 25%`, which rounds up to +1 pod at `re
